subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 

Dialysis claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first two digits = 
“P9.” The total Medicare payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_NCH_PMT_AMT where the 
LINE_PRCSG_IND_CD was “A,” “R,” or “S” — for all relevant lines.

LONG NAME: DIALYS_MDCR_PMT
